entries.source: Contract: one sentence reminding me that you will ask one question at a time and I can ask for a hint, rephrase, example, challenge, synthesis, or reveal.

entries.source: Debate safeguards, social democracy, and the cost of constitutional compromise.
entries.value: Doodda ilaalinta, dimuqraadiyadda bulshada, iyo qiimaha tanaasulka dastuuriga ah.

entries.source: Debrief rule: when the learner asks to end or debrief, summarize discoveries, evidence confidence, remaining uncertainties, and award a passport stamp.
entries.value: Xeerka dib-u-eegista: marka baruhu uu codsado in la soo afjaro ama la soo koobo, soo koob natiijooyinka, kalsoonida caddaynta, hubanti la'aanta hadhay, oo bixi shaambad baasaboor.

entries.source: Debugging is not guessing. You form a hypothesis, inspect the smallest failing path, then change one variable at a time.
entries.value: Cilad-saarku maaha qiyaas. Waxaad samaysaa mala-awaal, baartaa dariiqa ugu yar ee fashilmay, ka dibna beddel hal doorsoome markiiba.

entries.source: Define the concrete finish line and owner.
entries.value: Qeex khadka dhamaadka ee la taaban karo iyo mulkiilaha.

entries.source: Define the thing we are making and the standard it has to meet.
entries.value: Qeex shayga aan samaynayno iyo heerka ay tahay inuu buuxiyo.

entries.source: Delete the fetch and hard-code the answer.
entries.value: Tirtir soo-qaadista oo si adag u qor jawaabta.

entries.source: Delhi was a central site in the 1857 rebellion
entries.value: Delhi waxay ahayd goob dhexe oo ka mid ah kacdoonkii 1857-kii

entries.source: Demand shifts right because coffee is more expensive.
entries.value: Baahidu waxay u wareegtaa midig sababtoo ah kafeega ayaa ka qaalisan.

entries.source: Develop the strongest option into something testable.
entries.value: U beddel ikhtiyaarka ugu xooggan wax la tijaabin karo.

entries.source: Diagnose one industry in 5 sentences: identify two strongest forces, explain why, and judge whether profits look protected.
entries.value: Baadh hal warshad 5 jumladood: aqoonso labada xoog ee ugu waaweyn, sharrax sababta, oo xukun haddii faa'iidada ay u muuqato mid la ilaaliyay.

entries.source: Difficulty rises or softens based on your response.
entries.value: Dhibaatadu way kordhaa ama way yaraataa iyadoo ku xidhan jawaabtaada.
toos, wax-dhis leh, diiradda saaraya caddaynta

entries.source: Do not run this as a generic chatbot or a famous-person costume.
entries.value: Ha u maamulin tan sidii chatbot guud ama qof caan ah oo is-qarinaya.

entries.source: Documented, plausible reconstruction, modern paraphrase, contested, or fictionalized.
entries.value: Dukumenti, dib-u-dhis la aamini karo, weedho casri ah, la isku khilaafsan yahay, ama sheeko-xariir ah.

entries.source: During crisis, exile, trial, or imprisonment
entries.value: Inta lagu jiro dhibaatada, masaafurinta, maxkamadaynta, ama xadhiga

entries.source: End every sprint with an artifact or decision.
entries.value: Sprint kasta ku soo gabagabee shay ama go'aan.

entries.source: End this session with a debrief artifact: what the person argued, what I challenged, strongest insight, weakest claim, historical context learned, open questions, recommended next encounters, and any saved quotes clearly marked as generated paraphrases unless sourced.
entries.value: Kalfadhigan ku soo gabagabee shay debrief ah: waxa qofku ku dooday, waxa aan ka hor-yimid, aragtida ugu xooggan, sheegashada ugu daciifsan, macnaha taariikhiga ah ee la bartay, su'aalaha furan, kulamada xiga ee lagu taliyay, iyo wixii xigashooyin ah ee la kaydiyay oo si cad loogu calaamadeeyay inay yihiin weedho la soo saaray ilaa laga helo ilo.
Ingiriisi ka dhex jira ciidamada Shirkadda
Waxay u dhigantaa isticmaalka nuxurka iyo barashada.
Waxay u dhigantaa aqoonta iyo awoodda.

entries.source: Era, public worldview, voice, and what records can support.
entries.value: Era, aragtida adduunka ee dadweynaha, codka, iyo waxa ay diiwaannadu taageeri karaan.

entries.source: Evaluate legacy without flattening context into excuse or condemnation.
entries.value: Qiimee dhaxalka adigoon u beddelin macnaha guud cudurdaar ama cambaarayn.

entries.source: Events the person has already lived through.
entries.value: Dhacdooyinka qofku uu hore u soo maray.
Wadahadallada saxda ah ee gudaha meelaha sare

entries.source: Exact sequence of a street encounter
entries.value: Isku xigxiga saxda ah ee kulanka waddada
Wadahadallada saxda ah ee waddada waa la qiyaasay

entries.source: Exact timing of every alley evacuation
entries.value: Waqtiga saxda ah ee daadgureynta marinka kasta
Dhaqdhaqaaqa saxda ah ee dadweynaha maalinta maxkamadda

entries.source: Exact words spoken by ordinary people
entries.value: Erayada saxda ah ee ay ku hadleen dadka caadiga ah

entries.source: Exactly. Easy comparison and switching give customers leverage over platforms.
entries.value: Si sax ah. Isbarbardhigga fudud iyo beddelidda ayaa siinaya macaamiisha awood ay kaga sarreeyaan aaladaha.

entries.source: Explain a debugging plan: state the symptom, your first hypothesis, the smallest test, and what each result would mean.
entries.value: Sharax qorshe cilad-saarid: sheeg calaamadda, mala-awaalkaaga koowaad, tijaabada ugu yar, iyo waxa natiijo kasta ay ka dhigan tahay.

entries.source: Explain a market change by naming the curve that moves, the reason it moves, and what happens to price and quantity.
entries.value: Sharax isbeddelka suuqa adiga oo magacaabaya qalooca dhaqaaqaya, sababta uu u dhaqaaqayo, iyo waxa ku dhacaya qiimaha iyo tirada.

entries.source: Explain the idea in your own words, give one example, give one non-example, and apply it to a new case.
entries.value: Fikradda ku sharax ereyadaada, bixi hal tusaale, bixi hal tusaale oo aan ahayn, oo ku dabaq kiis cusub.

entries.source: Expose missing input, risk, time pressure, or unclear scope.
entries.value: Muuji waxa ka dhiman xogta, khatarta, cadaadiska waqtiga, ama baaxadda aan caddayn.

entries.value: Fatehpur Sikri waxay ahayd xarun boqortooyo

entries.source: First question: exactly one simple diagnostic question.
entries.value: Su'aasha koowaad: hal su'aal oo fudud oo lagu ogaanayo xaaladda.

entries.value: Hagaajinta fariinta khaladka ee muuqata adigoon raadin xaaladdii keentay.

entries.value: Calaamadee macluumaadka muhiimka ah adigoon buuxin jawaab kasta.

entries.value: Raac su'aal taariikhi ah adigoo eegaya dadka, walxaha, iyo awoodda.

entries.source: Follow an ordinary or decisive day with setting, pressure, and choices.
entries.value: Raac maalin caadi ah ama go'aan leh adigoo eegaya goobta, cadaadiska, iyo doorashooyinka.

entries.source: Give me a topic or paste notes. I will build 12 focused cards with optional hints, traps, and examples.
entries.value: I sii mawduuc ama dheji qoraallo. Waxaan samayn doonaa 12 kaar oo diiradda saaraya oo leh tilmaamo ikhtiyaari ah, dabinno, iyo tusaalooyin.

entries.source: Give one parallel example that helps me think without solving my target. End with one question.
entries.value: I sii hal tusaale oo barbar socda oo iga caawinaya inaan fekero anigoon xallin bartilmaameedkayga. Ku soo gabagabee hal su'aal.

entries.source: Good base. Review the misses below.
entries.value: Aasaas wanaagsan. Dib u eeg wixii kaa khaldamay ee hoose.

entries.source: Good. You tested timing before rewriting the data model.
entries.value: Wanaagsan. Waxaad tijaabisay wakhtiga ka hor inta aadan dib u qorin qaabka xogta.

entries.source: Group similar ideas and name the pattern.
entries.value: Kooxee fikradaha isku midka ah oo u bixi magac qaabkaas.

Ururada ayaa qaabeeyey awoodda madaniga ah

entries.source: Hand the next move to me. Give me one clear task and wait for my contribution before you revise.
entries.value: Iigu dhiib tallaabada xigta. I sii hal hawl oo cad oo sug tabarrucayga ka hor inta aadan dib u eegin.

entries.source: Higher price does not mean demand increased. The tax starts on the supply side by changing seller costs.

entries.source: How do you want to be seen when you arrive?
entries.value: Sidee baad rabtaa in laguu arko marka aad timaaddo?

entries.value: Sidee bay awooddaadu u xooggan tahay hadda?
Sidee bay caddayntu u muuqan kartaa?
Sida ay tahay inaan u shaqayno

entries.source: I am asking for direct explanation. Give a concise explanation, then require me to restate the corrected idea in my own words.
entries.value: Waxaan waydiisanayaa sharraxaad toos ah. Bixi sharraxaad kooban, ka dibna iga dalbo inaan fikradda saxda ah dib ugu celiyo ereyadayda.

entries.source: I can compress the explanation, but I still need one proof of understanding before unlocking the next step.
entries.value: Waan soo koobi karaa sharraxaadda, laakiin weli waxaan u baahanahay hal caddayn oo muujinaysa fahamka ka hor inta aan la furin tallaabada xigta.

entries.source: I could not answer right now. Please try again.
entries.value: Hadda kama jawaabi karin. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

entries.source: I could not build that deck right now. Try a shorter topic or simpler notes.
entries.value: Hadda ma dhisi karin xirmo kaararkaas. Isku day mawduuc ka gaaban ama qoraallo ka fudud.

entries.source: I could not build that quiz right now. Try a simpler topic or try again.
entries.value: Hadda ma dhisi karin imtixaankaas. Isku day mawduuc ka fudud ama mar kale isku day.

entries.source: I could not save that card review. Please try again.
entries.value: Ma kaydin karin dib-u-eegista kaarkaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

entries.source: I could not score that answer. Please try again.
entries.value: Ma qiimayn karin jawaabtaas. Fadlan mar kale isku day.

entries.source: I will keep the lesson active: hint, repair, slow down, or raise the challenge when you ask.
entries.value: Casharka waan sii wadi doonaa: tilmaan, hagaajin, gaabinta xawaaraha, ama kordhinta caqabadda marka aad codsato.

entries.source: If I am ready, ask me to state the idea in my own words. If not, ask the one question needed before final synthesis.
entries.value: Haddii aan diyaar ahay, i weydii inaan fikradda ku sheego ereyadayda. Haddii kale, i weydii hal su'aal oo loo baahan yahay ka hor soo koobidda kama dambaysta ah.

entries.source: If price rises while volume stays steady, revenue can increase. If costs rise faster, free cash flow may still fall.
entries.value: Haddii qiimuhu kaco iyadoo muggu uu joogto yahay, dakhligu wuu kordhi karaa. Haddii kharashyadu ay si dhakhso ah u kordhaan, qulqulka lacagta caddaanka ah ee bilaashka ah ayaa laga yaabaa inuu weli hoos u dhaco.

entries.source: If production costs rise, sellers need a higher price to supply the same quantity, so the supply curve shifts left.
entries.value: Haddii kharashka wax-soo-saarku kaco, iibiyeyaashu waxay u baahan yihiin qiimo sare si ay u bixiyaan isla tiradaas, markaa qalooca sahaydu wuxuu u wareegayaa bidix.

entries.source: If you understand a concept, you can give an example, a non-example, and solve a small unfamiliar case.
entries.value: Haddii aad fahanto fikrad, waxaad bixin kartaa tusaale, tusaale lid ku ah, oo aad xallin kartaa kiis yar oo aan la aqoon.
Wuxuu iska indho-tirayaa sababaha dhinaca sahayda.

entries.source: Ignoring slavery, freed status, and patronage would make your assumptions visibly modern.
entries.value: Iska indho-tirka addoonsiga, heerka xorriyadda, iyo taageerada waxay ka dhigi doontaa mala-awaalkaaga mid casri ah oo muuqda.
